title: lasianthus kinabaluensis
intro: Lasianthus kinabaluensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the Kinabalu Lasianthus or mountain tea. It is native to the island of Borneo, specifically in the mountainous regions of Sabah, Malaysia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, and has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, headaches, and digestive problems. The leaves and flowers of the plant can be prepared as a tea, which has been used to promote health and well-being, and also as a herbal remedy to reduce stress and anxiety.
